title: Crunchy Spicy Greek Chickpeas Stew
description: A low‑calorie Greek‑style stew bursting with smoky heat, finished with a crunchy roasted chickpea topping and a bright citrusy finish.

ingredients.name: Spice blend (cumin, smoked paprika, red pepper flakes)
ingredients.notes: combines all three spices into one convenient mix

ingredients.name: Roasted chickpeas topping
ingredients.notes: roasted with 1 tsp olive oil, pinch salt, ¼ tsp cumin, and ¼ tsp smoked paprika for crunchy finish

instructions: Preheat oven to 400 °F (200 °C). Toss the ½ cup cooked chickpeas with 1 tsp olive oil, pinch salt, ¼ tsp cumin, and ¼ tsp smoked paprika. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 15–20 min, turning once, until crisp. Set aside.
Heat 1 Tbsp olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the diced onion and red bell pepper, sautéing until softened, about 5 min.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 1 min until fragrant.
Add the canned diced tomatoes, tomato paste, and spice blend. Cook for 3 min to meld flavors.
Pour in the vegetable broth, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low. Add the cooked chickpeas and simmer for 20 min, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the fresh lemon juice and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if desired. Simmer for another 5 min to allow flavors to marry.
Serve the stew hot, topped with the roasted chickpeas and a sprinkle of chopped parsley if using.
Optional: accompany with warm pita, a side of Greek yogurt dip, or a light cucumber salad.
